age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation is allowed as per government rule.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Master's Degree/ Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Electronics from a recognized University or equivalent + GATE/NET qualified. PhD aspirants.
qualification.details: First class Master's Degree/ Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Electronics from a recognized University or equivalent + GATE/NET qualified. PhD aspirants. Candidates should check the eligibility criteria and qualification process of the PhD program of BITS Pilani, Pilani campus (http://www.bitsadmission.com/phmain.aspx).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month as JRF for NET/GATE Candidates, Rs. 30,000/- per month as Project Associate-I for Non Net/GATE Candidates
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- per month (for NET/GATE Candidates) Project Associate-I: Rs. 30,000/- per month (for Non Net/GATE Candidates)

selection_process: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their merit
and as per the requirements of the project. Shortlisted candidates will be informed of the interview
which will be conducted through online mode. Only qualified and suitable candidates will be called for an interview.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 positions is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First class Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Electronics from a recognized University or equivalent, and must be GATE/NET qualified. PhD aspirants are also encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for these positions is 30 years. Age relaxation is permissible as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: For Junior Research Fellow (JRF), the salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month for NET/GATE candidates. For Project Associate-I, the salary is Rs. 30,000/- per month for non-NET/GATE candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply online by filling out a Google Form with their CV and supporting documents before the last date. The link is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on merit and experience. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is project-based.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Who can I contact for queries regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any queries, you can email to: [email protected].
